PharmacopoeiaDrugs.name: Paracetamol (Acetaminophen)
uses: Relief of mild to moderate pain
PharmacopoeiaDrugs.storage: Store in a well-closed container, protected from light and moisture.

PharmacopoeiaDrugs.name: Aspirin (Acetylsalicylic Acid)
PharmacopoeiaDrugs.storage: Store in airtight containers, protected from moisture.

PharmacopoeiaDrugs.name: Amoxicillin
uses: Treatment of bacterial infections (respiratory, urinary, skin)
Part of H. pylori eradication therapy
PharmacopoeiaDrugs.storage: Store capsules and tablets in a dry place, oral suspension refrigerated after reconstitution.

PharmacopoeiaDrugs.name: Ibuprofen
uses: Relief of mild to moderate pain
PharmacopoeiaDrugs.storage: Store at room temperature, protected from moisture and light.

PharmacopoeiaDrugs.name: Metformin
uses: First-line treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus
May be used in polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS)
side_effects: Vitamin B12 deficiency with long-term use
PharmacopoeiaDrugs.storage: Store at room temperature, protected from moisture.

dose.elderly: Start with reduced doses, monitor renal function
